---
title: "Néphrologie"
---

## CUEN {#cuen .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="cuen">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://cuen.fr/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/cuen.png" alt="CUEN">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://cuen.fr/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">CUEN</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Collège Universitaire des Enseignants de Néphrologie
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## KDIGO Guidelines {#kdigo .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="kdigo">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://kdigo.org/guidelines/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/kdigo.png" alt="KDIGO Guidelines">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://kdigo.org/guidelines/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">KDIGO Guidelines</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Kidney Disease: Improving Global Outcomes
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```
